emails.subject: RE: Executive Program on Credit Risk
emails.body: Vince, next time this program will be offered in CA in October (see below). Let me know what you think, Tanya. "Isero, Alicia" <isero_alicia@gsb.stanford.edu> on 01/07/2000 12:38:12 PM
